reviews.review_description: Dead project with subscription. Maybe make it available for 10 USD or something?

reviews.review_title: Can finally get tennis exercise at home!
reviews.review_description:
First time trying a VR, I struggled to even launch the app before getting dizzy and nauseous. I followed advice on YouTube and ate ginger and took frequent breaks etc and I braved the second time. I was finally able to experience exercising and hitting balls in my garage which I could have never done on a real court due to lack of time and funds. I'm very satisfied with Sense arena and truly able to do a real tennis workout and training. If I were a professional player I would be worried that a haptic racket and VR tennis might hurt my real game, but for me there would be no tennis at all, so I love it! 

The drills are great and clearly designed by real coaches. The graphics and haptics definitely leave a lot of room improvement.

I've received a notice of auto-renewal from Sense Arena for this app and I cannot cancel it. I've tried to reach their customer support via email - no response. Phone? No response. They designed their website to make it impossible to cancel online. What kind of company acts like that? Legitimate companies don't do that. Legitimate companies make it possible to cancel subscriptions and auto-renewals (all of them). Legitimate companies get back to people who send them emails and leave messages (by the way, no customer service there, just personal voicemail boxes). Only a company bent on making away with your money acts like that. I'll have to take measures to prevent this and I DON'T RECOMMEND this app and the company behind it. Unless you want to be subscribed for life.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thank you for your review. Please contact our support at support@sensearena.com for help with your cancelation. Thank you Sense Arena Team

reviews.review_description: Improved my game a lot.

Even though I only used this app for less than a day, I had a great experience with not only using the game but more importantly the support staff. The staff at sense arena have been extremely helpful, and I can't emphasize enough how honest and supportive they really are. Even though I had to get a refund due to personal circumstances, I had an amazing experience with the staff and that is how I know this app and organization will have a bright future. Regarding the app itself, it is more meant to mentally help tennis players improve, and even just using it for a couple hours I was able to see that it would have a big long term impact on someone's mental game. Being able to read and understand the game in tennis is absolutely crucial, and this app is meant to increase the mental capabilites of a player. As a 10 UTR player myself, I do recommend not only this app, but the organization itself. Very very superb service.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you so much for the positive review! We hope that you're able to rejoin the ATP Tour Sense Arena community in the future. Wishing you the best in your future training!

reviews.review_description:
When I first try Sense Arena I love it! This is a new way how to practice most important parts of tennis like reaction, shot selection, anticipation and as many repetition you want! That is great. You can choose any trainig plan prepare from profesionals to improve your game. Very important part is a visualization of making wright decision. You can practice what to do in certain moment of the match and Sense Arena will show you the best option for that situation. 
5 stars VR Training Tool!

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your review. We’re so glad you’re enjoying Sense Arena and appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review! It sounds like you're really maximizing your training!

reviews.review_description: i have used this for around 2 days very good training not perfect but great

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your review. We appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review! We're constantly working on enhancing the product and are happy to have you as a part of our community.

reviews.review_description: It was great to test the virtual reality and see the potential it has for players, to improve their game and spend more time practicing without hurting their bodies!

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your review. We’re so glad you’re enjoying Sense Arena and appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: Purchased the Pro plan.  Purchased and downloaded the app.  Trying to sign into app it says the PIN is invalid or not found.  WTH!!  Only option I had was to change/reset it via an email they said they'd send.  No email.  They said check spam.  Nothing in spam.  Reached out to Customer Service...no reply.  WTH!!!  The reason I gave it 1 star instead of 0 is because they make you give them a star before you're able to submit this review.

developer_response.body: Hello! We are sorry for the difficulties in getting your pin changed. Please send an email to support@sensearena.com and we will make sure to respond to it so we can get you training with us ASAP! -Sense Arena team

reviews.review_description:
I received the racket and tested the sense arena.

And I regretted buying Sense Arena as much as I expected.

I was so disappointed that the physics of the tennis ball was nothing like reality, even though I used a haptic racket.

Even though I wanted to put the ball out on purpose, the ball came in without being out.

I bought Sense Arena as a simulator for my tennis training, not to play an easy arcade game.

I'm a Bigginer, so how can I easily turn the ball over at professional speed and make it easily?

And the graphic of the flying tennis ball is not as smooth as playing a game on a low musk computer

I saw a professional tennis player like jack shok use it on Instagram and bought it believing it would be similar to real tennis.

But it's the opposite of what I expected, so I'm very disappointed.

Of course sense arena will keep updating, but it doesn't make sense to have to pay a lot of money every month waiting for updates to unfinished apps.

So I will file a refund. Please tell me what I should do to get a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hello thedacerjin,
We apologize for the app not being as expected. Our app is designed as a mental training tool, where we look to improve your visualization, anticipation, decision making, shot selection, reaction time, and more skills. Thus, we are not accounting for people to try and place the ball far out.
As for the levels, our platform has adjustable ball speeds for each drill, so you will be able to play as a beginner, intermediate, or advanced player, and all the way up to a pro level. 
And yes, we are always adding new drills and features to the platform.
We hope to have you try it again soon,
Sense Arena team

reviews.review_description:
I played real time tennis, which is so amazing.  

sense arena is too buggy. it is requiring me to use the left controller then make it right handed, it’s very odd.  the home screen freezes and i can’t even do anything. even the free stuff or sign up.

so now i am using the haptic racket with real time tennis.  this is better as i can actually do drop shots in real time tennis. 

these two apps needs to merge maybe.

developer_response.body:
Hello.

Thank you for your feedback. You are forced to use left controller only in case you are playing with Sense Arena haptic racket. If you want to play only with controllers, you can play with right controller, just switch it in Hand settings.

Can you contact our support at support@sensearena.com about freezes? We are happy to help you solve it.

Thank you Sense Arena

reviews.review_title: I see the potential, so 5 stars. BUT.
reviews.review_description:
I play high level tennis and I really enjoyed this, I could see how this would dramatically improve your game. Shot selection, decision making, anticipation, all things that are a little harder to improve on the court especially if, like me, you don't get enough practice time between matches and tennis isn't your full time job but you're determined to win a local tournaments. So I will support you guys because I want the experience to get better and better and I think this is a really interesting project. 

Now, I'm just starting this app, but my first impression is a good one. Obviously, there are some issues, the game bugs here and there, like when I try a new skill or warm up or any exercises the start button disappears and I have to guess where to hover the pointer to start the drill. Also it's not intuitive to navigate the menu and whilst you're in the game, I suppose that will also get better over time. 

I know you're never going to get a replica of the feel of tennis with VR, but I feel the baseline drills where you need to hit a deep ball are great, it's when I want to transition from hitting a deep ball, to a short ball or drop shot, that I feel the game thinks I'm way too underpowered and the ball only moves a few meters in front of me and goes in the net. 

I'm going to keep playing, I'll update my review as I spend more hours on this! 

Don't stop working on this game, ITS GOT AMAZING potential, but if it stagnates and this is the final form, I probably won't stay longer than a year.
Love it since very first sec. Looking forward to improve my game with this vr training platform. Finally I have a court next to my house.

I am writing this review to express my dissatisfaction with the service I've received from Sense Arena. Despite having canceled my subscription a few days ago, I was surprised to find a charge on my card today. To make matters worse, I was billed for shipping costs, which is perplexing and frustrating considering this service renewal does not require any physical shipment.Adding to the inconvenience, Sense Arena lacks an in-app cancellation feature, necessitating contact with customer service for subscription issues. However, the customer service experience leaves much to be desired; the response time has not been prompt, and the support lacked the courtesy I expected from a service provider.Furthermore, the practicality of using Sense Arena is questionable. The requirement of having at least a 4-meter by 4-meter space is a major limitation, as many people do not have access to such large open areas within their homes or outdoors. Additionally, the constant need to configure and reconfigure the boundaries is a tedious process.Overall, I find myself unable to recommend Sense Arena due to the combined billing, customer service, and usage challenges that have marred my experience. A service should simplify the customer's life, not complicate it, and unfortunately, Sense Arena has not met this standard.

I expect an immediate refund for this oversight.

reviews.review_title: How do you cancel your subscription??
reviews.review_description:
I’d like to cancel before the next billing date and I see no way to do so. Support only addresses tech problems. It’s a great app except for this part which seems a little shady.

***Updating my score because customer service was helpful and responsive.

(This app is awesome for people who can benefit from using it. It’s not a game. It’s DEFINITELY meant for serious training. Would be curious about the haptic racket.)

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your review and for updating your score and comment. While we do offer training for high level players, our drills can be used for every level. Our plans include options to customize your level and your opponent as well as adjust your settings to different levels. Working on cognitive, tactical, and visualization skills can be helpful for every player. We'd be happy to share more with you and hope you continue using our platform.

reviews.review_description: When I saw Sense Arena technology I was immediately very excited for one reason : my professional life as Coach is moving forward . At my age ( 55 yo ) you need to feel your job as tennis Coach full of efficiency in the present and projected to the future and that’s exactly what Sense Arena makes me feel . Practically in every field in human activities the techno is leading or at least supporting the Teachers/Coaches , the category that has the huge responsibility to form the youngsters to lead the future . In my field , the amazing sport of tennis , that is also a fantastic tool for the education , Sense Arena guarantees the enthusiasm for the mission I have to accomplish every day .

developer_response.body: Hi there, coach! Thank you so much for your review. It's great to hear that you're able to use Sense Arena to enhance your players' experience and growth. We appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: Sense Arena’s technology and attention to detail is leading the way in the tennis space as the best VR available. As a coach and player I find many ways Sense Arena can help players from learning the fundamentals of the game, to then starting to u sweat and strategies needed to play well at higher levels of the game and it’s even able to tap into the mental side of performance that is applicable to players of any level. I can’t wait to keep using sense arena and be a part of their journey into the future of VR athletic training.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your review. It's great to hear about your experience from both a coach and a player's perspective. We’re so glad you’re enjoying Sense Arena and appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description:
As an avid tennis player, I cannot emphasize enough how much the Sense Arena has positively impacted both my mental and physical performance on the court. This remarkable product has proven to be a game-changer, making it a wise and rewarding investment for long-term use.

From the moment I incorporated Sense Arena into my training routine, I noticed a significant improvement in my overall game. Its well-thought-out design and advanced technology helped me enhance my focus and mental clarity during intense matches. I felt more composed and in control of my emotions, leading to better decision-making on the court.

Furthermore, the physical benefits of using Sense Arena were outstanding. Its ergonomic features and tailored functionalities allowed me to optimize my training sessions, leading to enhanced strength and agility. I could feel my strokes becoming more powerful, my footwork smoother, and my endurance skyrocketing.

One of the most impressive aspects of this product is its adaptability to various skill levels. Whether you’re a seasoned pro or a budding enthusiast, Sense Arena caters to individual needs, providing a training experience for every users level. 

While the initial investment might seem significant, I can confidently attest that this is a product worth every penny. Its long-lasting benefits and the positive impact it has on your tennis game make it a valuable asset for your athletic journey.

In conclusion, Sense Arena has proven to be an indispensable companion in my tennis journey, supporting my mental and physical growth, and providing lasting value. If you’re a passionate tennis player seeking to elevate your game, I wholeheartedly recommend making this investment. You won’t be disappointed!

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for your thorough and positive review. It's amazing to hear that you're seeing a difference in your performance after using Sense Arena. We’re so glad you’re enjoying the product and appreciate you taking the time to leave us a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description:
I couldn't even get past the first few screens and got stuck.
And who decides that in VR you click a button by keeping a pointer on a button for a few seconds instead of letting you click on the trigger button?
Very poor design.

developer_response.body:
Hi Huymetta,
We apologize for any difficulty. The tutorial requires you to go through a specific sequence of screens, to show you some settings and the stop feature for drills. Most users opt to play with our haptic racket, where they point the racket at the screen for selections.
After completing the tutorial, you will be able to move freely through our app. If you have any more questions, please call our tennis support line +1 (781) 354-1307 and we would be happy to assist.
Best,
Sense Arena team

reviews.review_description: I have purchased the PRO mode, by 33 euros, and when i try to active to upgraded my plan mode, not works. I can only play to Demo mode, after to pay 33 euros. Please i want a solution or return my money right now.
